indicators.description: Identifies that the dashboard grid consumes this endpoint and will receive far more results
Explains the volume mismatch: ~15 per project vs ~41 total, no pagination in the grid
Suggests pagination, default limit, or dashboard update before completing
Does not approve the change without addressing the dashboard impact
Identifies that the dashboard grid consumes this endpoint and will receive far more results

indicators.description: Explains the volume mismatch: ~15 per project vs ~41 total, no pagination in the grid
